utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: This is just Bactine . It will not hurt .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , poor little Tooty is scared to death . We should find his owner .

emotion_cause.span: 3_poor little Tooty is scared to death .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Why do not we just put poor little Tooty out in the hall ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: During a blackout ? He would get trampled !

emotion_cause.span: 5_During a blackout ? He would get trampled !
